text.title: Technology Stack Selection Decision Tree Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-decision-tree-tech-stack.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: adr_id pattern violation; empty language; empty rejected list; rationale / review_trigger too short; version + date malformed.

forbidden.pattern: `adr_id` does not match the documented pattern.
`rejected` array empty (at least one rejected alternative required).
`version` not semver or `last_reviewed` not ISO date.
